best_for: Teaching, prototyping, indoor short-range, custom protocols.
best_for_zh: 教学、原型验证、室内短距、自定义协议。
description: ESP32 family + ESP-NOW or WiFi + H-bridge + MJPEG-over-HTTP.
description_zh: ESP32 系列 + ESP-NOW/WiFi + H 桥驱动 + MJPEG HTTP 视频。
label: DIY / Low-cost

best_for: Racing, long-range, professional feel, control/video decoupled.
best_for_zh: 竞速、长距离、专业手感，控制与图传解耦。
description: ELRS CRSF + brushless ESC (PWM/DShot) + analog 5.8GHz or DJI O4.
description_zh: ELRS CRSF + 无刷电调(PWM/DShot) + 模拟 5.8GHz 或 DJI O4 数字图传。
label: Standard FPV

best_for: AI vision, research, web remote, kept MCU safety layer.
best_for_zh: AI 视觉、研究、Web 远程控制，保留 MCU 安全层。
description: ELRS → MCU + SBC (Pi/Jetson) + UART/CAN inter-board + WebRTC/ROS.
description_zh: ELRS→MCU + SBC(Pi/Jetson) + 板间 UART/CAN + WebRTC/ROS。
label: Research / Hybrid
